name: Number 106: Giant Hand
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>１０６ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>巨岩</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょがん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>掌</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ジャイアント・ハンド
name_jp_tl: Numbers 106: Huge Rock Palm - Giant Hand
desc:
2 Level 4 monsters
When a monster effect is activated on your opponent's field (Quick Effect): You can detach 2 materials from this card, then target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; while this monster is face-up on the field, that Effect Monster's effects are negated, also it cannot change its battle position.
mnst_eff:
2 Level 4 monsters

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Duels From the Deep

jp_sets.set: Collectors Pack: Duelist of Legend Version

action: Detaches multiple Xyz Materials as cost
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
